Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 9 (oxygen):

- Atom 10 (C:10) - carbon atom

From the image, I can see that the oxygen atom (red sphere labeled O:9) is bonded to two carbon atoms (yellow spheres labeled C:4 and C:10), forming what appears to be an ether or similar functional group.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 3426, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_3426.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 9 (O) are:
- Atomic index 4, element C
- Atomic index 10, element C

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
